jobPosting.shortTextEn: The Department of Mathematics at Aarhus University is seeking top early-career researchers for a number of attractive 3-year postdoctoral positions within Mathematics, with earliest possible start date 1 September 2026.

descriptionEn.technicalText: Postdoc positions are available in areas including Beyond Unitary Representations of Locally Compact Groups and Triangulated Categories and Representation Theory. The list may be updated with new areas up until the application deadline. As a successful candidate you are expected to shine in individual and collaborative research, either assist groups of bachelor's students in doing homework or co-teach advanced courses relevant for your research area.
